title: salvia potus
intro: Salvia potus, also known as blue skullcap, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Salvia potus include relieving stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as reducing symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Salvia potus can be consumed through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, or applied topically in the form of creams and salves.
